message:
fix(storage): check git commit state for 2PC recovery, not filesystem

The TxManager recovery logic for pending transactions previously used
skill_exists() to check if a skill was present, but this only checks
the filesystem. If the git commit failed after writing files but before
completing the transaction, recovery would incorrectly assume success.

Added skill_committed() method to GitArchive that checks if a skill
actually exists in the HEAD commit tree, ensuring accurate recovery
decisions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
